title: Lay paving
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Lay paving demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan and prepare for paving work

pcs.text: Read work instructions relating to paving work and confirm with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Read work instructions relating to paving work and confirm with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Read work instructions relating to paving work and confirm with supervisor.

pcs.text: Prepare and use tools and equipment according to supervisor instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare and use tools and equipment according to supervisor instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare and use tools and equipment according to supervisor instructions.

pcs.text: Check and confirm quantity and quality of materials according to job plan requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and confirm quantity and quality of materials according to job plan requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and confirm quantity and quality of materials according to job plan requirements.

pcs.text: Identify workplace health and safety hazards, assess risks and report to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify workplace health and safety hazards, assess risks and report to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify workplace health and safety hazards, assess risks and report to supervisor.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to task.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Plan and prepare for paving work

elements.title: Set out and prepare paving area

pcs.text: Mark out area to be paved according to site plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Mark out area to be paved according to site plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Mark out area to be paved according to site plan.

pcs.text: Assist with pegging reduced levels of proposed paving area according to site plan and supervisor instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assist with pegging reduced levels of proposed paving area according to site plan and supervisor instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assist with pegging reduced levels of proposed paving area according to site plan and supervisor instructions.

pcs.text: Maintain clean and safe worksite during paving activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain clean and safe worksite during paving activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain clean and safe worksite during paving activities.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Set out and prepare paving area

elements.title: Undertake ground preparation

pcs.text: Excavate area to shape, depth and dimensions to sub-base level
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Excavate area to shape, depth and dimensions to sub-base level?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Excavate area to shape, depth and dimensions to sub-base level.

pcs.text: Trim subbase to designated level and falls to ensure that final level of paving can be achieved
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Trim subbase to designated level and falls to ensure that final level of paving can be achieved?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Trim subbase to designated level and falls to ensure that final level of paving can be achieved.

pcs.text: Assist with construction of drainage systems according to site plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assist with construction of drainage systems according to site plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assist with construction of drainage systems according to site plan.

pcs.text: Place and compact base material to required depth according to site plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Place and compact base material to required depth according to site plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Place and compact base material to required depth according to site plan.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Undertake ground preparation

elements.title: Lay bedding material

pcs.text: Establish screed rails to ensure bedding course is maintained
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish screed rails to ensure bedding course is maintained?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish screed rails to ensure bedding course is maintained.

pcs.text: Spread bedding material evenly over area according to supervisor instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Spread bedding material evenly over area according to supervisor instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Spread bedding material evenly over area according to supervisor instructions.

pcs.text: Level bedding material to designated level and falls
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Level bedding material to designated level and falls?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Level bedding material to designated level and falls.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Lay bedding material

elements.title: Lay pavers to a given pattern

pcs.text: Set grid string lines to required levels to ensure designated pattern of project is attained and to maintain straight lines of components
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Set grid string lines to required levels to ensure designated pattern of project is attained and to maintain straight lines of components?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Set grid string lines to required levels to ensure designated pattern of project is attained and to maintain straight lines of components.

pcs.text: Set out pavers to required dimensions and pattern
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Set out pavers to required dimensions and pattern?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Set out pavers to required dimensions and pattern.

pcs.text: Lay whole pavers and compact to established finish level
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Lay whole pavers and compact to established finish level?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Lay whole pavers and compact to established finish level.

pcs.text: Mark, cut and fit pavers to fill gaps in pattern within nominated tolerances
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Mark, cut and fit pavers to fill gaps in pattern within nominated tolerances?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Mark, cut and fit pavers to fill gaps in pattern within nominated tolerances.

pcs.text: Install permanent edge constraints to prevent movement of pavers
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Install permanent edge constraints to prevent movement of pavers?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Install permanent edge constraints to prevent movement of pavers.

pcs.text: Spread jointing material over paved area and compact to finished level
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Spread jointing material over paved area and compact to finished level?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Spread jointing material over paved area and compact to finished level.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Lay pavers to a given pattern

elements.title: Clean site and store tools and equipment

pcs.text: Sweep jointing material evenly over paving
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Sweep jointing material evenly over paving?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Sweep jointing material evenly over paving.

pcs.text: Dispose of or recycle soil and waste material from site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Dispose of or recycle soil and waste material from site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Dispose of or recycle soil and waste material from site.

pcs.text: Clean, maintain and store tools and equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean, maintain and store tools and equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean, maintain and store tools and equipment.

pcs.text: Report work outcomes, and malfunctions, faults, wear or damage of tools to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report work outcomes, and malfunctions, faults, wear or damage of tools to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report work outcomes, and malfunctions, faults, wear or damage of tools to supervisor.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E6: Clean site and store tools and equipment
